title: drosera nitidula var. patens
intro: Drosera nitidula var. patens, also known as a sundew, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the Droseraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Drosera nitidula var. patens include relieving congestion, soothing a sore throat, and reducing inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
